trend.bullish: Price is trading above EMA20 (${{ema20}}) and EMA50 (${{ema50}}) with both EMAs in bullish alignment. ADX at {{adx}} indicates {{adxStrength}} trend strength, and +DI ({{plusDI}}) is above -DI ({{minusDI}}). The trend structure supports upside continuation.{{readiness}}
trend.bearish: Price is trading below EMA20 (${{ema20}}) and EMA50 (${{ema50}}) with both EMAs in bearish alignment. ADX at {{adx}} indicates {{adxStrength}} trend strength, and -DI ({{minusDI}}) is above +DI ({{plusDI}}). The trend structure favors further downside.{{readiness}}
trend.sideways: Price at ${{close}} does not have confirmed EMA/DMI directional agreement. EMA20 is ${{ema20}}, EMA50 is ${{ema50}}, and ADX at {{adx}} indicates {{adxStrength}} trend strength. Market is likely ranging or transitional.{{readiness}}
trend.no_data: No valid price data available. Signal stays neutral.
trend.not_ready: Data sample is not deep enough for trade-grade conviction, so the engine stays conservative.

volume.unreliable: Volume data is missing or unreliable for this asset (frequent zero-volume candles). Volume spike and OBV confirmation are disabled; signal is based on price action and momentum only.
volume.unavailable: Volume data not available for this asset. Signal based on price action and momentum only.
volume.spike: Volume is {{ratio}}x above the 20-period average — volume spike detected, suggesting strong conviction behind the current price action. {{obv}}
volume.normal: Volume is at {{ratio}}x the 20-period average. No significant volume spike detected. {{obv}}
volume.obv_rising: OBV is rising, confirming volume supports the move.
volume.obv_falling: OBV is declining, suggesting volume diverges from price action.
volume.obv_flat: OBV is flat — no strong volume conviction.

momentum.summary: RSI at {{rsi}} indicates {{rsiStatus}}.{{div}} MACD histogram is {{macdStatus}} ({{macdHist}}). StochRSI at {{stochRSI}} is {{stochStatus}}. Price is {{bbPosition}} within Bollinger Bands (%B: {{percentB}}%).
momentum.no_data: Momentum cannot be evaluated without valid price history.

faq.title: Curious? Got Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything needed to kickstart the journey and stop the guesswork.

questions.a: RabaLaba is a professional financial research terminal for multi asset analysis, featuring rule based signals and real time data.

questions.q: Is the terminal free to use?
questions.a: RabaLaba offers the '$t(subscription.plans.basic.name)' tier is free for basic research. For advanced features, the '$t(subscription.plans.professional.name)' and '$t(subscription.plans.ultimate.name)' tier for professional.
Data comes straight from institutional grade providers like Yahoo Finance and other trusted giants. Real time and credible.

questions.q: Is the sign up process quick?
questions.a: Create an account in seconds with a valid email for full access. Verification is instant so market research starts right away.

hero.subtitle: The top tier class of market analysis for Indonesia Stocks, US Stocks, Crypto, Commodities, and Forex. Accurate signals, zero noise, infinite money glitch.

features.subtitle: The Ultimate Kit to
features.description: High impact research terminal built for those who value data over FOMO.

multi_asset.title: Multi Asset Research
multi_asset.description: Monitor Indonesia stocks, US stocks, crypto, commodities, and forex on one screen. Cross market research made effortless.

sentiment.title: Long Short Sentiment
sentiment.description: Analyze rule based buy and sell signals with transparent signal strength scores, decision support not predictions.

trading_plan.title: Trading Plan Setup
trading_plan.description: Get auto generated entry, stop loss, and take profit levels with precision. Master plan and execute trades with ease.

volume.title: Volume Analysis
volume.description: Detect whale movements through significant spikes in trading volume. Confirm market trends with real time data not just vibes.

calendar.title: Economic Calendar
calendar.description: Track major global economic events that trigger market volatility. Stay updated on CPI, FOMC, and high impact news to keep edge.

auto_journal.title: Automated Market Journal
auto_journal.description: Automatic market analysis updates following execution schedules. Track market action effortlessly with zero manual input.
